import{useState,useEffect}from'react';/**
 * Custom hook for debouncing values
 * @param {*} value - Value to debounce
 * @param {number} delay - Delay in milliseconds
 * @returns {*} Debounced value
 */export const useDebounce=function(value){let delay=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:500;const[debouncedValue,setDebouncedValue]=useState(value);useEffect(()=>{const handler=setTimeout(()=>{setDebouncedValue(value);},delay);return()=>{clearTimeout(handler);};},[value,delay]);return debouncedValue;};
